description: Enhancement (#1474): a single wave of two workers with max_parallel 2 is supervised concurrently, not one worker driven fully to completion before the next is dispatched. #100 commits only on its third turn while #101 commits on its first; because both are supervised in parallel, #101's dispatch send lands in the CLI log before #100's final (third) send — a crossover that is impossible under sequential supervision, where all of #100's sends would precede #101's. Both workers complete and the wave advances to success.
